IDataSourceOrderBy Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The IDataSourceOrderBy type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
IsDescending
Gets or sets a value indicating whether descending sort should be applied.
SortColumn
Column that supplies the values used for sorting the data source.
